title: SynthesisPlan
description: Output of synthesize_variants(descriptors). Consumed by /iterate-on-plan --prototype-context to drive convergence-aware refinement of design.md and tasks.md. Enumerates per-aspect source-variant picks and suggested synthesis actions.

change_id.description: Change-id this synthesis plan applies to.

recommended_findings.description: Pre-classified convergence.* findings for iterate-on-plan to surface during refinement. Each entry conforms to iterate-on-plan's standard finding shape with a convergence.* type prefix.

source_variants.description: Variant IDs that informed this finding.

synthesis_notes.description: Optional free-text summary of the synthesis rationale — carries forward any synthesis_hint values from contributing VariantDescriptors.

oneOf.description: Variant id to source this aspect from.
None of the variants' takes on this aspect are suitable; iterate-on-plan should rewrite it fresh based on other context.

rationale.description: Why this source won for this aspect.
